cards.name: 7 of Wands
cards.interpretation: protectiveness, standing up for yourself, defending yourself, protecting territory

cards.name: 8 of Swords
cards.interpretation: trapped, restricted, victimised, paralysed, helpless, powerless, imprisonment

cards.name: ⅩⅩ Judgement, reversed
cards.interpretation: self-doubt, lack of self-awareness, failure to learn lessons, self-loathing
